infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: KisanDekho needs photo library access to attach images or videos to your questions.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: KisanDekho needs camera access to capture photos and videos for your questions.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: KisanDekho needs microphone access to record audio for your questions.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: KisanDekho uses your location to tag questions with the correct district and block.

plugins.photosPermission: KisanDekho needs photo library access to attach images or videos to your questions.
plugins.cameraPermission: KisanDekho needs camera access to capture photos and videos for your questions.

plugins.photosPermission: KisanDekho needs photo library access to save and attach images or videos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: KisanDekho needs permission to save captured photos and videos.
